$comment: Shared validation context for the conformance corpus. An implementation under test loads THIS as the world a program is validated against — the skill registry (V4/V5) and per-workspace grant scopes (V4), plus query response shapes (V5 output-reference typing, 0.2). The contract version is THIS file's `conformance` field and the bound profiles, NEVER a schema $id (nilscript keeps $id on /0.1/ across releases; the release lives in versions/ + verb semver). Mirrors wosool-cloud/.../skills/ + nilscript/sdk/grants.py::scope_allows.

refund.$comment: 0.2: NIL arg is the abstract refund_target {type,id} (southbound). The DSL HINT stays simple — the skill's to_proposes maps the hint onto refund_target. Hints != NIL args.

record_fulfillment.$comment: 0.2: replaces the fulfillment axis of update_order_status. Records a fact; the System derives status.

record_payment.$comment: 0.2: replaces the financial axis of update_order_status. Floor HIGH.

order_status.$comment: 0.2: DEPRECATED (one-MINOR overlap; removed 0.3.0). Still admissible but a conformant validator MUST emit V4_DEPRECATED_VERB (WARNING) and the program still admits. Replacement: record_fulfillment / record_payment.

list_clients.$comment: 0.2: read verb with a TYPED response profile (nilscript services-v1/list_clients.response.json). `response_schema` describes the shape of a query node's `output`, so V5 can type $.step.output.clients[0].id and reject unknown-field / array-as-object references.
